code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let words = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut max_val = 0
  mut found = false
  mut i = 0

  while i < words.len()
    let word_opt = words.get(i)
    match word_opt
    when Some(word)
      let num_opt = string.parse_int(word)
      match num_opt
      when Some(n)
        if n > 0
          if not found
            max_val = n
            found = true
          else
            if n > max_val
              max_val = n
            end
          end
        end
      when None
        # skip non-integer tokens
      end
    when None
      # skip
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  if found
    print("max=#{max_val}")
  else
    print("none")
  end
end
